recordings.title: Gutter Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for how a real gutter client onboarding call is run. Note: gutters require different ad angles and ~2x the booking volume vs roofing to be profitable.

recordings.title: Roofing Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for how a real roofing client onboarding call is run. Primary niche (80–90% of clients). Watch this one carefully.

recordings.title: HVAC Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for HVAC-specific onboarding nuances. Different pain points and seasonality vs roofing.

recordings.title: Service Delivery Part 1
recordings.description: GHL setup walkthrough — how the sub-account build works from start to finish.

recordings.title: Service Delivery Part 2
recordings.description: Most recent service delivery process. Watch this first before Part 1 if choosing one.

recordings.title: Entire GHL Build Start to Finish
recordings.description: Complete sub-account build walkthrough using standard A2P (not A2P Wizard). Understand the full picture even though Emmanuel handles this for you.

reference_recordings.title: New Onboarding Process & Comp Structure
reference_recordings.description: Jonathan, Cole, and Tyler walk through the updated onboarding process and compensation structure. Key context for how pod managers are expected to operate.

reference_recordings.title: Accounts Review
reference_recordings.description: Oscar and Jonathan review account health across all pods — covers what good and bad account management looks like, and how to handle underperforming campaigns.

reference_recordings.title: Pod 3 Marketing Meeting
reference_recordings.description: Jonathan runs through marketing strategy with Pod 3 — covers account triage, creative refreshes, and how to read Meta performance data.

reference_recordings.title: Day 1 Onboarding — Pod 4
reference_recordings.description: Full Day 1 onboarding session with Sam. The most comprehensive single recording of what new pod managers cover — tools, process, client management, and expectations.

sop_links.title: Service Delivery SOP
sop_links.description: Full written SOP for the service delivery process. Reference document — don't memorize, know where to find it.

tools.title: Ad Set Reviewer
tools.description: QA tool used by VAs and media buyers to review creatives before launch. Know these standards — you're approving setups.

training_looms.title: Advanced Pixel Conditioning — Full Walkthrough
training_looms.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of the advanced pixel conditioning process. Only run this when lead volume is high — withholding conversion events when volume is low will hurt performance. Watch this before touching CAPI settings.

training_looms.title: KPI Breakdown: What Happens to Cost Per Appointment When You Scale?
training_looms.description: Jonathan breaks down the full KPI hierarchy and explains the relationship between spend level, lead volume, and cost per confirmed appointment. Core framework every pod manager must understand before any scaling decision.

training_looms.title: Bottleneck Analysis — When a Client Is Struggling
training_looms.description: Systematic framework for diagnosing exactly what's wrong with an underperforming account. Follow this before escalating. Covers the full funnel from ad level down to VA call quality.

training_looms.title: What Our VA Team Does — Real Call Walkthrough
training_looms.description: Inside look at what VAs actually say on calls to homeowners. Understand the full call flow so you can diagnose VA performance issues accurately and brief Leila when quality drops.

training_looms.title: Lead Flow Slow-Down: 7-Day Window Fix
training_looms.description: Walk-through for diagnosing and fixing when a client's lead flow drops for a 7-day period. Covers the top-of-funnel triage: ad level KPIs → landing page → survey → duplicate campaign reset.

training_looms.title: Good Ad Metrics, Low Lead Volume — Trust & Survey Fix
training_looms.description: When CPC and CTR look fine but leads aren't coming in, it's usually a trust or survey friction issue. This covers switching from 7Q to 4Q survey, adjusting the landing page, and notifying the VA team.

training_looms.title: Ad Metrics Off-KPI: Low Lead Volume Fix
training_looms.description: When CPC/CTR/CPM aren't in range and lead volume is suffering. Covers how to identify whether it's a creative problem, targeting problem, or budget constraint — and what to do in each case.

training_looms.title: Lead Quality Low: Full Volume & Quality Breakdown
training_looms.description: When volume is fine but quality is sub-par. Covers pixel seasoning triggers, VA pre-call SMS changes, CNAM/phone trust fixes, and survey qualification adjustments to improve lead intent.

training_looms.title: Slow Lead Flow, Good Booking Rate
training_looms.description: When VA call quality and booking rate are strong but leads aren't coming in volume. The problem is entirely at the top of funnel — creative and/or targeting. Walk-through of how to address it without touching the VA layer.

training_looms.title: Slow Lead Flow + Infinite Cost Per Appointment
training_looms.description: Detailed fix walk-through for an account in a proven market where cost per appointment is way too high or zero. Covers CNAM, landing page headline, creative reset, secondary phone numbers, and copy switch to MAIN/KNOW V2.

training_looms.title: Out-of-Service-Area Leads — Survey Question Fix
training_looms.description: When a high proportion of leads are coming from outside the service area. This covers adding a qualifying question at the survey level to filter OSA leads before they reach the VA team.

training_looms.title: OSA + Targeting Audit — Klaus Roofing Oregon
training_looms.description: Client with good lead volume but a high percentage of out-of-service-area leads and non-responsive contacts. Full diagnostic walk-through of targeting settings, zip code exclusions, and the Logbook OSA filter.

training_looms.title: Weak Lead Flow + Major OSA Problem — Creative Development Mastery
training_looms.description: When you have both an OSA problem and creative fatigue hitting at the same time. The creative development mastery process — how to rebuild ad sets that attract in-area homeowners and filter out low-intent contacts.

training_looms.title: Slow Booking Flow + Bad OSA — Problem Solving
training_looms.description: When booking rate and OSA are both failing simultaneously. Covers diagnosing whether the issue is VA quality, targeting, or survey friction — and which lever to pull first.

training_looms.title: Creative Fatigue After 2–3 Months — Ad Set Swap
training_looms.description: When an account has been running 2–3 months and performance starts declining from creative fatigue. The correct approach: use lead-to-ad attribution data to identify performers, turn off non-performers, and build the next set from what's already working.

training_looms.title: Rising Costs After 3–4 Months — Copy & Creative Overhaul
training_looms.description: When an account has spent months using the same copy with only creative swaps and costs keep rising and won't come back down. This is when you change the copy angle entirely — how to approach it.

training_looms.title: Full Creative Refresh with Psychological Triggers
training_looms.description: US Shingle: longstanding account, extremely slow lead flow. Full creative refresh using psychological trigger angles — what to change in the copy, what photo combinations to build, and how to test new angles without resetting the pixel.

training_looms.title: Polishing Creatives for a Refresh — Why a Set Wasn't Working
training_looms.description: Detailed video explaining why a specific creative setup underperformed, how to identify the visual/copy mismatch, and what changes turned around the campaign. A framework for creative QA before launch.

training_looms.title: Creative Selection for High-Spend Accounts
training_looms.description: When a big client gives you everything you need but the account is underperforming — how to manage your creative reserve, sequence refreshes, and avoid burning through all photos too fast.

training_looms.title: Ad Attribution — Which Ad Drove Which Lead
training_looms.description: When leads come in but the Lead Mastersheet doesn't show which ad drove them. How to trace back from a lead to the specific creative that converted, so you can scale winners and kill losers.

training_looms.title: A/B Test: Pricing Angle (KNOW) vs Story Angle (MAIN)
training_looms.description: Client wants to test KNOW angle (starts at pricing) vs MAIN angle (story-based, no numbers) to reduce price shoppers and improve close rate. How to set up the split, read results, and decide which angle wins.

training_looms.title: Ad Fatigue Killing Lead Flow — HVAC (Applies to All Niches)
training_looms.description: HVAC account with ad fatigue causing lead flow collapse. The diagnostic and recovery process is identical for roofing — study the methodology, not just the niche specifics.

training_looms.title: Great Ad Metrics, Low Landing Page Conversion + Copy Switch
training_looms.description: When CTR looks fine but the survey opt-in rate is below 2.5%. Covers landing page headline changes, switching ad copy angle, and how to test both simultaneously without polluting your data.

training_looms.title: Ad Spend Locked at $50/Day — How to Fix
training_looms.description: When Meta caps a client's account at $50/day and business verification is not available. The specific fix for bypassing the spending limit and what to do if the business portfolio is ineligible for verification.

training_looms.title: CNAM: Delete Existing Record and Reapply
training_looms.description: How to delete an existing CNAM record and apply for a new one. Run this when a client's calls are showing as Likely Spam or Fraud on the recipient's phone. Steps inside GHL phone number settings.

training_looms.title: Switching an Account to an A2P-Verified Sub-Account
training_looms.description: When you need to move a client's setup to a sub-account that already has A2P verified — the full process for transferring assets, automations, and confirming the new number is properly configured.

training_looms.title: GHL → Google Sheets → Client CRM via Zapier (Pt 1/2)
training_looms.description: How to connect GHL to Google Sheets and then to a client's CRM (e.g. Acculynx) using Zapier so leads auto-sync. Part 1 covers the Google Sheets setup and initial Zap creation.

training_looms.title: GHL → Google Sheets → Client CRM via Zapier (Pt 2/2)
training_looms.description: Part 2: completing the Zapier integration, testing the connection, and handling edge cases when you switch from a 7Q to 4Q survey (you must update the Google Sheet headings and re-map the Zap fields).

training_looms.title: Connecting Zapier to Client CRM (Roofr)
training_looms.description: Specific setup for clients using Roofr as their CRM — how to create contacts under the client's Roofr account automatically using Zapier triggered from GHL survey submissions.

training_looms.title: Multiple Service Areas — Full GHL Setup
training_looms.description: How to set up a client with multiple service areas (different markets, different VAs, different phone numbers). Covers survey routing, automation assignments, phone number assignment, and VA user setup.

training_looms.title: Installing RI Ad System on Client's GHL (Not Our Agency)
training_looms.description: When a client has a dealbreaker requiring us to install our system inside their own GHL agency account rather than ours. How to handle client communications, asset transfer, and sub-account configuration.

training_looms.title: Shortening HVAC Survey from 7Q to 5Q
training_looms.description: The full process for shortening a survey to reduce friction — removing questions, updating GHL automations, updating the Zapier field mapping, and notifying the VA team of the change.

training_looms.title: Sophisticated GHL Problem-Solving — Live Session
training_looms.description: Live problem-solving session inside a client's GHL — covers edge cases in automation, calendar setup, and integration issues that aren't covered by standard SOPs.

training_looms.title: Longstanding Client Hints at Cancelling — How to Handle
training_looms.description: When a client who has been with us for months starts hinting at cancelling due to a recent performance dip. How to reframe results, propose a gameplan, and loop in Oscar when needed.

training_looms.title: Consistent Results → Performance Drops — Longstanding Account
training_looms.description: When a client that has performed consistently for months suddenly sees lead flow drop and more OSA leads. The account-aging diagnostic — what causes performance degradation over time and how to reverse it.

training_looms.title: Bad Appointment Flow Fix — Sales Rep Coordination
training_looms.description: When leads are booking but appointments aren't showing up or being confirmed by the client's sales team. How to diagnose whether it's a VA handoff problem, a sales rep problem, or a calendar setup issue.

training_looms.title: Client with Sales/Closing Issues — Not a Leads Problem
training_looms.description: When a client complains about lead quality but the real issue is their sales team's close rate. How to identify it from the data, have the conversation with the client, and document it so you're not blamed for a sales failure.
